project_type: AWS CDK C# Infrastructure-as-Code project (sleep audio pipeline)
build_system: .NET SDK with dotnet CLI, AWS CDK CLI via npx
verification_instructions: 1. Run 'dotnet restore src/CdkBase.sln' to restore packages. 2. Run 'dotnet build src/CdkBase.sln' to compile. 3. Run 'dotnet test src/CdkBase.sln' to run tests. 4. Run 'npx cdk synth' to synthesize CloudFormation template.
setup_instructions: 1. Install .NET 8 SDK: bash /tmp/dotnet-install.sh --channel 8.0. 2. Export PATH=$HOME/.dotnet:$PATH. 3. Install CDK CLI: npm install -g aws-cdk. 4. Run dotnet restore src/CdkBase.sln.
environment_constraints: COMMON_DEPENDENCIES network mode - can access nuget.org and npmjs.com. .NET SDK must be installed first (not pre-installed). Node.js v22 is available. Must unset NODE_OPTIONS before running npm/npx commands.
contribution_requirements: TDD-first approach: write failing tests before implementation. Use CDK Assertions for infrastructure testing. Keep architecture docs in sync.
key_patterns: CDK app entry point in src/CdkBase/Program.cs. Stack defined in src/CdkBase/CdkBaseStack.cs. Solution file at src/CdkBase.sln. cdk.json uses 'dotnet run --project src/CdkBase/CdkBase.csproj' as app command. Target framework is net8.0. Amazon.CDK.Lib version [2.252.0,3.0.0).
directory_structure: Root: cdk.json, README.md, .gitignore. src/: CdkBase.sln solution file. src/CdkBase/: Main CDK app project (Program.cs, CdkBaseStack.cs, CdkBase.csproj). No test project exists yet. No .github/ directory exists yet.
